title: Morgan Stanley takes on crypto trading rivals with E*Trade pilot
message_html: Morgan Stanley takes on crypto trading rivals with E*Trade pilot ...
snippet: The Wall Street bank is charging 50 basis points per crypto trade, below basic retail pricing at Coinbase, Robinhood and Charles Schwab.

title: OpenTrade raises $17M to expand stablecoin yield infrastructure after topping $200M TVL
message_html: OpenTrade raises $17M to expand stablecoin yield infrastructure after topping $200M TVL ...
snippet: OpenTrade raises $17 million as the stablecoin platform tops $200 million in TVL and expands infrastructure targeting neobanks and fintechs.

title: Stablecoin industry opposes Bank of England's unhosted wallet ban
message_html: Stablecoin industry opposes Bank of England's unhosted wallet ban ...
snippet: The crypto industry in the UK has come out against the Bank of England’s proposed policy that would ban custodial wallets for stablecoins.

title: Bitcoin hits longest negative funding streak this decade as K33 flags short squeeze risk
message_html: Bitcoin hits longest negative funding streak this decade as K33 flags short squeeze risk ...
snippet: Buying bitcoin during such negative funding regimes has consistently led to strong forward returns, Head of Research Vetle Lunde said.
